assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 27-31 show '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001' — all three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 33-39 show '## Code Intelligence' with 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5: 'Scanned available MCP tools for Serena instances: **none found**. No tools matching the `mcp__*serena*__*` pattern were detected.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: Line 6: 'Scanned available MCP tools for Atlassian/Jira instances: **none found**.' Lines 17-18: 'No Atlassian MCP tools found; automatic Jira discovery was not possible.' and 'User chose **manual entry** for Jira configuration.'

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 12-13: 'User was prompted about continuing without code intelligence.' and 'User chose to **continue without code intelligence**.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 41-45 show '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
